parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The uuidV4 identifier for the public asset.

parameters.name: app_id
parameters.description: The uuidV4 identifier of the app the asset is connected to.

parameters.name: asset_type
parameters.description: The type of the public asset.

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: The name of the public asset file (with extension) to be uploaded to Bitrise.

parameters.name: file_size_bytes
parameters.description: The size of the file in bytes.
